description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a mix of stone and smooth concrete exterior walls, complemented by large glass windows and a flat roof. The front facade includes a prominent arched window above the main entrance, which is flanked by two parked cars on a concrete driveway. The property extends to a spacious backyard with a well-maintained lawn, a large tree, and a patio area for outdoor seating. The side and rear views reveal a high privacy wall enclosing the backyard, as well as a secondary structure or covered area at the back. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the main facade, creating a tiered effect. The overall layout is rectangular, maximizing the use of the lot and providing both private and communal outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with stone and concrete walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a spacious backyard enclosed by privacy walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with an arched window, two cars parked on the driveway, and the stone facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard with a large tree, and the patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, privacy wall, and the secondary structure or covered area at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone wall, upper story setback, and the full extent of the backyard enclosure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with an arched window above the door, stone surround, and a small step up from the driveway
